description: The 'Ndrina Giampà is a powerful 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in the Nicastro district of Lamezia Terme, Italy. It emerged in the late 1980s under the leadership of Francesco Giampà, known as 'Il professore', who won a violent feud against a rival faction. The organization is involved in drug trafficking (cocaine and marijuana) and arms trafficking. It was a key player in the Lamezia Terme feud from 2002 to 2011, which resulted in numerous murders.
